subcategory: horizontal menu with icons and nested submenus
use_cases: Top-level navigation for websites and web applications
Navigation menus with icon-enhanced menu items
Navigation with disabled states and external links
ai_summary: A horizontal navigation menu component built with Ant Design featuring icon support, disabled item states, nested submenu groups, and reactive selection state management. The component renders a top navigation bar with mail, app store, and settings icons, supporting both click-to-select behavior and external link navigation.
